scenarios.label: Conservative
scenarios.description: Real return matching long-run AAA sovereign bond yield. Minimal equity exposure.
scenarios.source_label: Norges Bank Investment Management Annual Report 2022

scenarios.label: Baseline
scenarios.description: GPFG long-run real return target. 60/40 global equities/bonds with infrastructure overlay.

scenarios.label: Moderate
scenarios.description: Blended return with higher EM and infrastructure weighting — consistent with ISIF 5-year track record.
scenarios.source_label: Ireland Strategic Investment Fund Annual Report 2023

scenarios.label: Ambitious
scenarios.description: Temasek-style strategic equity portfolio. Higher risk, higher long-run return. Requires deep institutional capacity.
scenarios.precedent: Temasek: 14% total shareholder return since 1974 inception; normalised real ~6–8%

source_notes: Real returns computed net of management costs and inflation assumption of 2.5% (ECB medium-term target). Nominal yields from ECB AAA sovereign yield curve, 2026-Q1.
